blogs.title: Hello World
blogs.description: I welcome you to my personal blog exploring technology, blockchain, and creative coding. Expect insights on modern web development, decentralized systems, and innovative digital experiences.

nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #2
nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "A futuristic city with flying cars"

blogs.title: Ideas behind the blog stack
blogs.description: I share my journey from scattered notes to a unified blog using React and Vike. Modern web tech offers speed, simplicity, and full version control over traditional solutions.

blogs.title: Moving old lectures
blogs.description: I migrate academic lectures from LaTeX to modern web formats. Discover solutions for handling equations, references, and static site generation in JavaScript environments.

blogs.title: Are decentral websites a thing for me ?
blogs.description: I explore decentralized web hosting using ENS domains and IPFS storage. Discover how blockchain enables censorship-resistant websites without traditional hosting companies.

blogs.title: Is mirror.xyz a thing ?
blogs.description: I discover Mirror.xyz - a decentralized publishing platform combining Medium-like writing with Ethereum monetization. ENS domains and crypto wallets enable seamless creator support.

blogs.title: Can I have interactive python pages ?
blogs.description: I explore the future of interactive content with Python running directly in browsers. Tools like Pyodide and JupyterLite enable portable, installation-free data science.

blogs.title: Running an image generator
blogs.description: I build my own AI image generator using open-source models and European hosting. See how to integrate Stable Diffusion into static websites with full privacy and cost control.

blogs.title: A decentral support button
blogs.description: I build a decentralized support button using smart contracts for direct content monetization. Learn how blockchain enables transparent micro-payments without platform intermediaries.

blogs.title: My short lived contact with the world of VCs in Germany
blogs.description: I explore the challenges of transitioning from quantum research to startup entrepreneurship. Valuable lessons about VC funding, deep tech development, and German startup realities.

blogs.title: Generating AI images, paying anonymously and little
blogs.description: I implement anonymous micro-payments for AI image generation using Ethereum Layer-2. See how to connect blockchain payments with serverless AI for sustainable, privacy-focused services.

blogs.title: Updates to the website
blogs.description: I explore my website's evolution over 6 months, from minimal CSS to Panda CSS and Copilot refactoring. See how modern tools dramatically boost development productivity.

blogs.title: A gallery of AI images
blogs.description: I build an NFT gallery for AI-generated images using ERC-721 Enumerable contracts. Learn how to upgrade smart contracts and create integrated user experiences for collectibles.

nftMetadata.prompt: "A sleek, futuristic web interface showing a personal gallery of AI-generated NFT artworks connec...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #24
nftMetadata.description:
AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "A sleek, futuristic web interface showing a personal gallery of AI-generated NFT artworks connected to a crypto wallet. The scene includes one or more users interacting with the interface—viewing images, clicking buttons, scrolling the gallery, or using the image generation input at the top. The users are shown from behind or in profile, seated at modern desks or standing at digital kiosks, with screens reflecting soft light. Each artwork is presented as a card with options like zoom, download, share, and delete. The environment hints at a creative, tech-savvy atmosphere—possibly a home studio, co-working space, or minimalist digital art lab. UI elements include Ethereum wallet icons, NFT badges, and interactive controls. Subtle hints at future features like comment icons, user profiles, or DAO governance panels are also visible.

Style & Details:

    UI mockup meets concept art with human interaction

    Modern techwear or casual clothing for users

    Clean, bright interface with slight neon accents

    Glass panels, soft gradients, glowing edges

    Inspiration: OpenSea, futuristic art apps, virtual gallery spaces"

blogs.title: A public gallery of AI generated images
blogs.description: I create a privacy-focused AI image gallery where creators share work and collectors mint NFTs. Discover the technical details combining open-source generation with blockchain incentives.

blogs.title: The Prisoner's Dilemma
blogs.description: I explore the Prisoner's Dilemma through interactive game theory simulations. Discover strategic decision-making, Nash equilibrium, and how cooperation emerges in competition.

nftMetadata.prompt: "A picture that visualizes the prisoners Dilemma. The prisoners would like to cooperate, but they...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #30
nftMetadata.description:
AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "A picture that visualizes the prisoners Dilemma. The prisoners would like to cooperate, but they must betray each other. Each prisoners sit in separate interrogation room chained to the table. In each of the interrogation room you can see them being intensely interrogated by a police officer. The scences looks like taken from Breaking Bad. One of the prisoners resembles Walter White. The other one Jesse.

The two scenes in the interrogation rooms are floating an abstract environment of logical math expressions connected to game theory."

blogs.title: Tale of Four Islands: Solutions to the Tragedy of the Commons
blogs.description: I explore solutions to the Tragedy of the Commons through interactive island simulations. See how governance models affect resource sustainability and community outcomes.

blogs.title: Merkle Trees for LLM Batching - The fundamentals
blogs.description: I explore the fundamentals of Merkle trees for efficient LLM batching. Learn cryptographic proofs, batch verification, and AI service settlement optimization.

In the background, digital wallets and AI icons interact, symbolizing efficient, cost-optimized payments for AI services. The style should be modern, clean and minimalistic, suitable for a blog post about blockchain and AI integration."

blogs.title: My AI Assistant That Takes ETH Instead of Subscriptions
blogs.description: I build an AI assistant that accepts Ethereum payments instead of subscriptions. Discover how Merkle batching enables efficient prepaid AI with instant responses.

blogs.title: Quantum Smart Contracts I - Can we decentralize access to quantum computing with smart contracts ?
blogs.description: I explore how smart contracts can democratize access to quantum computing resources, enabling privacy-preserving decentralized payments and encrypted NFT results.

nftMetadata.prompt: "Depict a puzzle with a missing piece, where the missing piece is a smart contract. On some puzzl...

nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "Depict a puzzle with a missing piece, where the missing piece is a smart contract. On some puzzle pieces you can see comic style images of quantum computers. On other puzzle pieces you can see symbols that sympolize payments. On the missing piece that is laying slightly away from the puzzle you see a visualisation of a smart contract."

blogs.title: Quantum Smart Contracts II - What can we learn from NFTs for quantum computing with smart contracts ?
blogs.description: Can blockchain solve quantum computing's access problem? I tested the architecture with AI NFTs—here's what worked, what didn't, and what's still unsolved.

blogs.title: Making My Site Discoverable - SEO, Webmentions, and a Traffic Spike
blogs.description: I overhauled my site's SEO with Schema.org markup and replaced Giscus comments with Webmentions. The timing coincided with a surprising 200% traffic increase. Here's what I learned about making content discoverable.

nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "Vibrant illustration showing a central blog post icon with radiating connections to various social platform logos (Bluesky, Mastodon, Twitter), webmention protocol symbols, search engine icons, organic flowing connections, purple and cyan gradient, sense of decentralized communication, modern flat design with depth"

blogs.title: Democracy beyond the nation-state - What is there ?
blogs.description: When climate, water, and digital challenges cross borders but democracy doesn't, what's the alternative? This narrative essay compares confederation, federation, and cosmopolitan democracy through three fictional characters on a Barcelona-Tunis ferry.

nftMetadata.prompt: "A quiet 2 a.m. ferry lounge between Barcelona and Tunis. Three characters sit apart but connecte...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #160
nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "A quiet 2 a.m. ferry lounge between Barcelona and Tunis. Three characters sit apart but connected by scattered documents: Amara with Mediterranean water-basin charts, Sofia with EU briefing notes, and Adam with a glowing laptop showing AI regulations. Soft overhead ferry lights, empty seats, coffee machine humming in the background. Behind them, faint symbolic overlays: a confederation map dissolving into fragments, a federal structure with connected nodes, and a network-like web representing cosmopolitan democracy. Moody, reflective, cinematic atmosphere."

blogs.title: How bots exploited my ImageGen contract - and how I fixed it
blogs.description: A bot network exploited a vulnerability in my GenImNFT contract, extracting over 80 cents. Here's how they did it, how I fixed it, and what the forensic analysis revealed about the bot network that seemingly extracts substantial sums.

nftMetadata.prompt: "A high-quality, cinematic illustration showing a swarm of autonomous blockchain bots attacking a...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #161
nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "A high-quality, cinematic illustration showing a swarm of autonomous blockchain bots attacking a vulnerable smart contract. Visualize stylized digital “bot” entities (glowing geometric shapes or small drone-like agents) racing through a mempool-like network grid toward a smart-contract block labeled “GenImNFT”. One bot steals a tiny coin reward (symbolizing 80 cents), while alarms or red warning indicators flash around the contract. The scene should look technical, cyber-forensic, and slightly humorous due to the small value stolen. Use a dark, neon, cyberpunk color palette of blues, teals, and pinks. Include subtle blockchain motifs (Ethereum logo fragments, gas-fee graphs, bridging arrows). No text overlays."

blogs.title: First experiences with the x402 Standard for paying AI agents
blogs.description: I implemented the x402 payment standard for AI agents to autonomously pay for image generation services without accounts or sessions.

blogs.title: When political compromise becomes irrational
blogs.description: A simple model explains why budget negotiations might fail in democracies

blogs.title: Multi-Chain Architecture: Technical Notes
blogs.description: Technical summary of implementing multi-chain support for an NFT minting application. Notes on architecture, testing patterns, and lessons learned.

blogs.title: How to invest your money without predicting markets
blogs.description: A hands-on guide to ETF diversification using risk budgets, with interactive tools to find your own allocation.

A confident professional woman looking at a map with several routes connecting two cities. Some routes look risky and winding, others slow and safe, while a balanced route combines multiple paths. The mood is thoughtful and strategic, symbolizing smart planning under uncertainty. Clean educational illustration style, light colors, simple shapes, white background."

blogs.title: What Actually Protects Your Home?
blogs.description: A dinner conversation reveals why paying off your mortgage faster isn't always the safest strategy — and what actually protects your home when life goes wrong.

blogs.title: My take on a housing podcast: Rent vs. Buy Is Not One Decision
blogs.description: The podcast argument against buying a home is strongest for young mobile professionals, but much weaker once you distinguish between different households and the very different risks they face.

blogs.title: Ostdeutsche Spediteure stehen unter Kostendruck — aber wodurch eigentlich?
blogs.description: Ostdeutsche Spediteure erleben einen erheblichen Kostendruck unter anderem durch niedrigere Lohnkosten in osteuropäischen Nachbarländern. Interessanterweise, sind die Kostenunterschiede im Bereich von 10% und der eigentliche Kostendruck kommt aus einer anderen Richtung.

blogs.title: Building a Social Media Growth assistant for Under 50 Cents a Month
blogs.description: How I built a LangGraph-based social media assistant that generates, queues, and publishes posts to Mastodon and Bluesky — with human approval and a monthly cost of under 50 cents.

nftMetadata.prompt: "Friendly comic-style illustration, bright and optimistic colors, modern web-comic aesthetic. A s...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #1780780027794
nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "Friendly comic-style illustration, bright and optimistic colors, modern web-comic aesthetic. A small helpful AI assistant sits beside a blogger at a desk. The AI presents a stack of social media post drafts labeled "Draft 1", "Draft 2", "Draft 3". The blogger reviews them with a pen, approving some with green checkmarks and rejecting others with red crosses. On a monitor, a weekly publishing calendar shows scheduled posts. Cozy home-office atmosphere, clean desk, coffee mug, plants, soft daylight through a window. The AI looks helpful and collaborative rather than autonomous. No dystopian robots, no dark colors, no corporate stock-photo style. Professional but approachable."
